text.title: API Versioning Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: openapi diff shows 1 BREAKING (removed field email_verified) → decision=vN+1 → copy /api/v1/users handler to /api/v2/users with the field removed → mark v1 route deprecated in ops/sunset.yaml → measure traffic → 410 Gone on sunset date → delete handler after 30d zero traffic.

section.title: Resulting artefact
section.code: { "spec_id": "openapi.yaml", "decision": "create_v_next", "from_version": "v1", "to_version": "v2", "deprecation_date": "2026-06-01", "sunset_date": "2026-12-01", "rationale": "Removed email_verified field; breaking diff ids: response-property-removed.", "breaking_diff_ids": [ "response-property-removed" ] }

section.title: Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
